About Us

Who We Are

Suzhou Gallop Technology Co., Ltd. is a professional "One-Stop" elevator and escalator solution plan supplier based in Suzhou Industrial Park, China.

We are the supplier of mainstream elevator brands and the channel distributor for many major foreign customers. Our company has grown to become a trusted name in the elevator and escalator parts industry.

We specialize in providing high-quality replacement parts for all major elevator and escalator brands including Selcom, Fermator, Kone, Sword, Canny, Mitsubishi, and more. Our products are directly produced and shipped from our factory, ensuring the best quality at the most competitive prices.

500+
Global Customers
1000+
Product SKUs
20+
Brand Partners
24/7
Online Service

Our Services

Quality First

Every product undergoes strict quality control to ensure reliability and performance.

Global Shipping

We ship products worldwide with reliable logistics partners and tracking support.

Technical Support

Remote installation service consultation and technical support for after-sales problems.

Ready to Work With Us?

Contact us today for a free quote on elevator and escalator parts. We offer competitive factory-direct pricing with worldwide shipping.
